data.title: The British man implicated in the Qian Zhimin case, labeled a "professional money launderer," has been ordered to pay a $7.6 million fine or face an additional eight years in prison.
data.description: The Crown Prosecution Service (CPS) has ordered Sen Hok Ling, a key intermediary in the Zhimin Qian Bitcoin fraud case and known as a "professional money launderer," to pay £5 million (approximately US$7.6 million) to British authorities within three months, or face up to eight years in prison. The CPS stated that Ling assisted convicted fraudster Zhimin Qian (also known as Yadi Zhang) in transferring funds. Between February and April 2024, Ling received 83.7 bitcoins and cashed them out through UAE bank accounts and third-party channels. Ling pleaded guilty to one count of money laundering in November 2025 and was sentenced to four years and 11 months in prison. Zhimin Qian was sentenced to 11 years and 8 months on two counts of money laundering. Furthermore, regarding the final disposal of the 61,000 bitcoins under Qian Zhimin's name (the largest seizure of crypto assets in UK history), related civil proceedings are still ongoing. Future funds may be partially used to compensate victims, with the remainder potentially going to the UK Treasury. (Decrypt)

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.87 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.87 million yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time). Only the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL) saw net inflows yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time), with a single-day net inflow of $1.87 million and a historical total net inflow of $148 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.08 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.50%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $873 million.

data.title: OKX Star: The Crypto Industry is Entering a Long-Term Development Stage and Moving Towards Compliance and Maturity
data.description: According to official sources, on January 24th, OKX founder and CEO Stephen Star stated at a New Year's Eve dinner event hosted by OKX that since 2017, global regulatory agencies have been paying increasing attention to the industry, and the industry as a whole is shifting from its early "wild growth" to compliance and sustainable development. Star pointed out that young people born in the 1990s, 1995s, and 2000s are becoming a significant force in the cryptocurrency market, and their acceptance of asset transparency, self-custody, and technology-driven finance is reshaping global financial perceptions. He also called on industry practitioners and content creators to stay away from noise, adhere to technology-driven approaches and long-termism, and jointly safeguard the industry's reputation.

data.title: Solana Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow on January 23
data.description:
On January 23, Solana spot ETFs experienced a net inflow of $1.87 million, according to SoSoValue data. According to Odaily, the Fidelity SOL ETF FSOL was the sole contributor to this inflow, with a single-day net inflow of $1.87 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $148 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $1.08 billion, with Solana's net asset ratio at 1.50%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $873 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: If the Federal Reserve intervenes in the yen through "money printing," it will benefit Bitcoin.
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes stated in an article on the X platform that if the related news (that Japanese authorities may be preparing to intervene in the exchange rate) is true, it would be "extremely bullish" for Bitcoin. He analyzed that this logic is based on the premise that the Federal Reserve creates bank reserves by "printing money," then sells dollars to buy yen, thereby indirectly intervening in the yen's exchange rate. Arthur Hayes pointed out that if the Federal Reserve is indeed manipulating the yen, its balance sheet will show an increase through the "foreign currency-denominated assets" item, which can be verified in the weekly H.4.1 report.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $3.43 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $3.43 million yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise XRP ETF saw net inflows yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time), with a single-day net inflow of $3.43 million and a historical total net inflow of $319 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.36 billion, an XRP net asset ratio of 1.17%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.23 billion.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Records $3.43 Million Net Inflow on January 23
data.description:
XRP spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $3.43 million on January 23, according to Foresight News. Data from SoSoValue indicates that the Bitwise XRP ETF was the sole contributor to this inflow, bringing its historical total net inflow to $319 million.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF stands at $1.36 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.17%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $1.23 billion.

data.title: A major ETH whale increased its holdings by nearly 4,000 ETH at an average price of $2,991.91.
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the whale that cleared out its ETH holdings on January 22 has started a new trading wave. Nine hours ago, this address bought 3947.97 ETH (worth approximately $11.91 million) on-chain at an average price of $2991.91, and is currently experiencing a floating loss of $135,000.

data.title: Debate Continues Over Senate's Clarity Act Passage
data.description: Qinbafrank posted on X. The ongoing discussions in the Senate regarding the Clarity Act have yet to reach a consensus. The Senate Banking Committee's version of the Clarity Act remains unresolved, while the Agriculture Committee's version has not achieved bipartisan agreement, with only Republican members pushing through a version. The latest developments indicate that the review scheduled for next Monday is uncertain. Concerns arise over whether the delay in passing the Clarity Act will also postpone the SEC's innovation exemption, initially planned for implementation in January.

data.title: Pi App Studio introduces new features for 2026: payment integration and easier app creation options.
data.description: Pi Network announced three major updates to Pi App Studio: simplified Pi Payment integration, ad-supported free app creation, and a creator campaign to gather community feedback. Highlights include pioneers integrating Test-Pi payments without programming by mentioning "Pi payment" in new app prompts; users being able to deploy apps by watching ads when their balance falls below 0.25 Pi; and the first 1000 feedback survey participants receiving 5 Pi credits dedicated to App Studio.

data.title: Arianna Simpson, a partner at a16z Crypto, has announced her departure and plans to establish a new fund.
data.description: Arianna Simpson, a partner at a16z Crypto, announced her departure from the well-known crypto investment firm in a post on the X platform. She plans to launch her own new fund, expanding her investment scope to include various vertical sectors. She specifically thanked Chris Dixon, founder and managing partner of a16z Crypto, for his long-term guidance, stating that his investment framework will continue to influence her career. According to Chris Dixon's response, Arianna Simpson is an early advocate of cryptocurrency, has experience founding cryptocurrency funds, and then worked at a16z Crypto for six years, making several successful investments.

data.title: The total market capitalization of tokenized gold has surpassed $5 billion, setting a new all-time high.
data.description: According to Coingecko data, the total market capitalization of tokenized gold has surpassed $5 billion, currently reaching $5,184,957,415, setting a new all-time high. Among them, Tether Gold (XAUT) has a market capitalization of approximately $2.598 billion, up 1% in the last 24 hours; PAX Gold (PAXG) has a market capitalization of $2.02 billion, up 1.1% in the last 24 hours. Tokenized gold refers to physical gold presented in digital form on a blockchain platform, with these tokens backed by an equivalent value of physical gold held in custody by the issuing institution.

data.title: Cyber ​​Hornet has applied for an S&P Crypto 10 ETF, potentially becoming the first S&P ETF linked to a basket of spot crypto assets.
data.description: According to Eric Balchunas, an ETF analyst at Bloomberg, Cyber ​​Hornet has submitted an application for the S&P Crypto 10 ETF (CTX), which could become the first spot portfolio ETF linked to the S&P Crypto Index. The ETF's proposed holdings include: Bitcoin 69%, Ethereum 14%, XRP 5%, BNB 4%, Solana 2%, TRON 1%, Cardano 0.5%, Bitcoin Cash 0.4%, Chainlink 0.3%, and Stellar 0.2%.

data.title: Cyber Hornet Files for S&P Crypto 10 ETF
data.description: Cyber Hornet has submitted an application for the S&P Crypto 10 ETF (CTX), potentially becoming the first spot-based ETF linked to the S&P Crypto Index. According to Odaily, the proposed ETF's holdings would include 69% Bitcoin, 14% Ethereum, 5% XRP, 4% BNB, 2% Solana, 1% TRON, 0.5% Cardano, 0.4% Bitcoin Cash, 0.3% Chainlink, and 0.2% Stellar.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin: Institutions are not the enemy of cypherpunks; the key is to safeguard individual self-sovereignty.
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin stated that the relationship between "institutions" (governments and enterprises) and "cypherpunks" is highly complex, neither natural allies nor natural enemies.

The optimal strategy for institutions in this game is to strengthen control within manageable limits while resisting external intrusion. This makes them often more concerned with data sovereignty and security than ordinary users. In the future, institutions will place greater emphasis on self-management of wallets and staking, which is beneficial to Ethereum's decentralization. Simultaneously, KYC and privacy technologies will develop in parallel, and the game surrounding zero-knowledge proofs will continue for a long time. The core task of the Ethereum community is to build tools to protect individual self-sovereignty and freedom, while maintaining its own position in cooperation with institutions.
